titleStmt.title: SII 9.608: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 608. (A.R. No. 218 of 1913.) ON A ROCK NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT YALPI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1465, Śōbhakṛit, Phālguṇa, śu. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1544 March 4, Tuesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Rāmarājayyadēva-Mahā-arasu, agent to the king, granted exemption to the barbers of Yaḷappeya-sīme from siddhāya, teṟige, biṭṭi, birāḍa and other taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu 1645 neya .
śōbhakrutusaṁvatsarada phālguṇa śu 10 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāsivadēvamahārāyara kāryake kartarādaṁthā śrīma
maṁḍalēśvara rāmarājayyadēva mahāarasugaḷu yaḷappeya sīmeya nāyiṁda vō ja
gaḷu teruva grāmada kaṭṭu siddhāya terige biṭṭu birāḍa A(ṁ)nnu pa(ṁ)nnu yēnuṁṭāda
teṟuvudanellavanū sarvamānyavāgi pālisibiṭṭeŪ Ārobbaru tappi sidhāya terige
ya rokkavanu koṁḍare Ā nāyiṁdarige huṭṭidavaru Eṁdu baresida śilāśāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.608 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
